emails.body: Here is the revised review (password oberon). I have meetings scheduled for the afternoon and am not sure I will be able to get out of them at any particular time. Does it make sense to give her the review without me being there and meet later or not? To: Taylor, Mark E (Legal); Cash, Michelle
